title: Device Home Screen - Power off Headset while in the app
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app UI does not update to show headset as disconnected when headset is powered off while connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is powered on and connected to the app (Home screen shows the device as connected).
3. Power off the headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
4. Observe the app's Home screen UI.
expected: The app's Home screen UI updates to show the headset as disconnected (e.g., device status changes from "Connected" to "Disconnected" or the device is removed from the connected devices list).
